codeReview.summary: The change replaces the no-op accessibility helper with real NSAccessibility announcements and adds loading/load-result announcements, but it misses the switch failure transition announcement required by VAL-DASH-008 and the feature expected behavior.

issues.description: In the switch failure catch path, switchState is set to error but no accessibility announcement is emitted. This leaves an error transition unannounced (expected behavior requires success/error/loading announcements).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, but the recorded handoff evidence does not follow switcher-ui-worker procedure steps requiring broad validation and manual UI sanity checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file .factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md step 6 requires scoped + broad validation and step 7 requires manual checks. summary: Review failed: the feature partially implements accessibility announcements but omits announcement on switch failure, so required error-state announcement coverage is incomplete.
